text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The Kikuka Sho is approaching, and
Matikanefukukitaru's worries over her first
long-distance race begin to mount.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Concerned for her, Silence Suzuka offers some
words of encouragement.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
In her eyes, Matikanefukukitaru is a lot more
amazing than she believes. Suzuka tells her to
have a bit more confidence.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Gaining courage from those words,
Matikanefukukitaru vows to focus on the Kikuka
Sho with a new, positive mindset.
